## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`npm run format`)
- [ ] Changes have been tested locally
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
